headline: Inter Milan
body: Inter Milan is in advanced talks over a transfer.
text:
🚨 Inter Milan facing major competition from Chelsea & another PL side to sign Marco Palestra. #Inter working to land 21yo Italy int’l for €45+5m but no agreement between clubs. Serie A defender of year’s future to be decided in coming days @TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7386872…

Link



Inter Milan face competition from Chelsea for Atalanta’s Marco Palestra

Inter have been working to land the Italy international, 21, for €45million plus €5m in bonuses but an agreement has yet to be reached.
nytimes.com
